name: @googlemaps-samples/js-api-samples
description: Samples for the Google Maps JavaScript API.

scripts.build-all: npm run clean && npm run build-all-parallel && npm run generate-index
scripts.check-and-fix: echo eslint... && npx eslint --fix --quiet && echo prettier... && npx prettier -w --log-level warn . && echo tsc... && find ./ -name tsconfig.json -not -path '*/dist/*' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -exec echo '{}' \; -exec npx tsc --noEmit -p '{}' \;
